items.title: Yankees To Recall Elmer Rodríguez For MLB Debut
items.summary: The Yankees will recall highly-regarded pitching prospect Elmer Rodríguez this week, as first reported by Yankees Farm. The Yankees have already tabbed Cam Schlittler to go against Jacob deGrom in tonight’s fantastic pitching […]
